# Automation Engineer Assessment (Playwright)

## 📌 Project Overview
This project demonstrates UI and API automation using Playwright.

---

## ⚙️ Setup Instructions

1. Install dependencies:
   npm install

2. Install Playwright browsers:
   npx playwright install

---

## ▶️ Run Tests

Run all tests:
npx playwright test

---

## 📊 View Report

Generate & open HTML report:
npx playwright show-report

---

## 🧪 Test Coverage

### ✅ UI Automation (SauceDemo)
- Login with valid credentials
- Login with invalid credentials
- Product sorting validation
- Add products to cart
- Checkout flow
- Order confirmation validation

---

### ✅ API Automation (DummyJSON)
- Authenticate user
- Extract token & user ID
- Fetch user cart
- Add product to cart
- Validate response status
- Validate product & total price

---

## 🛠 Tools & Technologies
- Playwright
- JavaScript (Node.js)
- HTML Reporter

---

## 🚀 CI/CD
GitHub Actions workflow added to run tests automatically on push.

---

## 📁 Project Structure
tests/
  ├── ui.spec.js
  ├── api.spec.js
pages/
  ├── loginPage.js
playwright.config.js

---
